title: Millwrights
description: Install, dismantle, or move machinery and heavy equipment according to layout plans, blueprints, or other drawings.

tasks.text: Replace defective parts of machine, or adjust clearances and alignment of moving parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Align machines or equipment, using hoists, jacks, hand tools, squares, rules, micrometers, lasers, or plumb bobs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Insert shims, adjust tension on nuts and bolts, or position parts, using hand tools and measuring instruments, to set specified clearances between moving and stationary parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Signal crane operator to lower basic assembly units to bedplate, and align unit to centerline.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct preventative maintenance and repair, and lubricate machines and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble and install equipment, using hand tools and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble machines, and bolt, weld, rivet, or otherwise fasten them to foundation or other structures, using hand tools and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move machinery and equipment, using hoists, dollies, rollers, and trucks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Level bedplate and establish centerline, using straightedge, levels, and transit.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Dismantle machines, using hammers, wrenches, crowbars, and other hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Bolt parts, such as side and deck plates, jaw plates, and journals, to basic assembly unit.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lay out mounting holes, using measuring instruments, and drill holes with power drill.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach moving parts and subassemblies to basic assembly unit, using hand tools and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weld, repair, and fabricate equipment or machinery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Shrink-fit bushings, sleeves, rings, liners, gears, and wheels to specified items, using portable gas heating equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Troubleshoot equipment, electrical components, hydraulics, or other mechanical systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dismantle machinery and equipment for shipment to installation site, performing installation and maintenance work as part of team.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Connect power unit to machines or steam piping to equipment, and test unit to evaluate its mechanical operation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Position steel beams to support bedplates of machines and equipment, using blueprints and schematic drawings to determine work procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fabricate and dismantle parts, equipment, and machines, using a cutting torch or other cutting equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Construct foundation for machines, using hand tools and building materials such as wood, cement, and steel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate engine lathe to grind, file, and turn machine parts to dimensional specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install robot and modify its program, using teach pendant.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
